layerAffiliateInstructions: Account overlay repeats the base acceptance logic with no extra operational rules in this sample.
layerTravelerInstructions: Must include name and clinic information. Accepted paths are two vaccines 28 days apart, positive IGG titer, or negative/equivocal titer followed by booster or declination.
msInternalinstructions: Must Include: Name, Clinic Information. Measles, Mumps, and Rubella TWO VACCINES at least 28 days apart OR POSITIVE TITER results. Titers must be IGG, listed individually, with date collected. Reactive is positive, Non-Reactive is negative. IMMUNE and NONIMMUNE are accepted if IGG is not listed. If the titer is Negative or Equivocal, either a booster vaccine after the titer OR a signed Medical Solutions MMR declination form is accepted.
msAffiliateinstructions: Affiliate instructions mirror the accepted MMR paths: vaccine series, positive titer, or negative/equivocal titer followed by booster or declination.
msTravelerinstructions: Upload MMR evidence showing either two vaccines 28 days apart, a positive IGG titer, or a negative/equivocal titer plus booster or declination. Include all pages.
